name: jria-healthcheck-stub
description: Node.js health-check stub: responds on /health /healthz /readiness. Deployed to Azure App Service via WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE ahead of real app code.

scripts.copy: mkdir dist && cp -r server.js package.json package-lock.json dist/
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run copy && cd dist && zip -r ../app.zip .

author: rcarroll
